title: neottia eschscholziana
intro: Neottia eschscholziana, also known as the Upland Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of northeastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Neottia eschscholziana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
